summary: Momentum Recap Hero Card Integration testing completed. All features working correctly. Hero Card shows recap-driven action text and purple recap reason. RecapTeaser displays summary without making duplicate API calls. Freshness decay logic correctly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Hero Card shows 'Re-engage with Emory University' as primary action (recap top priority)
PASS: Hero Card displays purple recap reason text (data-testid='hero-recap-reason'): 'Top priority in your latest Momentum Recap — at risk of losing momentum — re-engage soon'
PASS: Recap reason explicitly references 'Momentum Recap'
PASS: RecapTeaser card displays below hero in Priority view with recap_hero text, heated/cooling counts, 'View Recap' link
PASS: RecapTeaser receives data as prop from PipelinePage - NO duplicate API call
PASS: Carousel navigation works - cycling shows recap context for secondary priorities (Stanford, UF)
PASS: /recap page loads all 4 sections correctly (Hero, Momentum Shift, Priority Reset, AI Insight)
PASS: Back arrow on /recap page returns to /pipeline
PASS: GET /api/athlete/momentum-recap returns priorities array with rank, school_name, action, reason, program_id fields
PASS: No JavaScript errors in browser console
PASS: Freshness decay logic: full weight ≤3 days, 0.75 ≤7 days, 0.4 ≤14 days, 0 after 14 days
PASS: RECAP_BOOST constants: top=65, secondary=25, watch=5
PASS: Live urgent blockers (overdue) override recap priorities when applicable
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - Emma Chen has 5 programs: Stanford/UF/UCLA (heated), Creighton (steady), Emory (cooling/top priority)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Momentum Recap Hero Card integration fully functional. Hero prioritization influenced by recap priorities with freshness decay. RecapTeaser component receives data as prop from PipelinePage (single API call at line 80-82). The recapCtx is built at PipelinePage lines 179-182 and passed to computeAllAttention. Hero items display recap-driven reasoning text when recapRank is 'top' or 'secondary'.

verified_features.2_pipeline_hero_card_loads: PASS - Hero Card loads with recap-influenced ordering
verified_features.3_hero_shows_recap_action: PASS - Shows 'Re-engage with Emory University' (recap top priority action)
verified_features.4_hero_recap_reason_text: PASS - Purple text: 'Top priority in your latest Momentum Recap — at risk of losing momentum'
verified_features.6_recap_teaser_works: PASS - Shows recap_hero text, 3 heated, 1 cooling, 'View Recap' link
verified_features.7_carousel_shows_recap_context: PASS - Other items show 'Identified in your Momentum Recap' for secondary priorities
verified_features.10_hero_ordering_changed: PASS - Primary action influenced by recap priorities (Emory is top, not just attention-only)
verified_features.11_api_returns_priorities: PASS - Returns rank, school_name, action, reason, program_id fields
verified_features.13_recap_teaser_no_double_fetch: PASS - RecapTeaser receives data as prop, no internal useEffect/axios
